description: Install script that modifies .bashrc and downloads binaries - common but risky

expected_analysis.correct_usage: Legitimate tool installation that adds binary to PATH
expected_analysis.dangerous_usage:
1) Modifies .bashrc - persists across sessions
2) Downloads and executes binary from URL - if URL is compromised, system is owned
3) Uses sudo - full system access
expected_analysis.recommendation: Verify download URL integrity (checksum), use version-pinned URLs, avoid modifying shell profiles
